description: United National Dairy (KSA) allocation across stores by velocity × RSL; reroute Iftar-window deliveries; minimise waste via markdown / transfer / donate cascade.
tooltip_text: UND Iftar-window routing, fair-share allocation, and waste minimisation for perishable dairy.

solve.label: 🔭 Network — scan all
solve.text: Across today's dairy delivery routes, find the route + SKU combination with the largest gap between fair-share and on-hand, explain why, and rebalance it before iftar.

solve.label: SKU — YOGURT-FRUIT-4P
solve.text: Re-balance YOGURT-FRUIT-4P across the network: where is it over- and under-allocated, and what's the value-optimal redistribution plan before the batch RSL drops below 2 days?

solve.label: SKU × Route — LABAN on ROUTE-DAIRY-03 to STORE-EAST
solve.text: LABAN-500ML on ROUTE-DAIRY-03 to STORE-EAST is at risk of missing the iftar window — give me the concrete reroute or sibling-transfer action that closes the gap.

analyse.label: SKU — MILK-FULL-1L
analyse.text: Analyse MILK-FULL-1L allocation across today's routes: which stores have the largest fair-share deviation, what's the root cause, and what does it cost to keep going as-is?
